content.body:
Logbook v1.1 pilot revealed metrics were structurally biased toward positive:
14 tasks showed zero rework and all first-pass approved, while the founder
experienced real friction (3 rounds of Designer corrections, Leo attempting
design solutions instead of delegating, branch deletion causing PR cascade).

New required fields close the gap between output quality and process quality:
- delegation.quality: correct_first | self_attempted_then_delegated | wrong_agent
- internal_iterations: significant rounds before formal delivery
- leo_errors: array of Leo's own operational mistakes per task
content.subject: feat(metrics): add 3 process-quality metrics — delegation, internal iterations, leo errors
content.summary:
